title: Claude Fable + Mythos 5 Are Live & The Numbers are INSANE
summary: Claude Fable and Mythos 5 models have been released with reported performance metrics. The announcement covers the launch of these language models and highlights their benchmarked capabilities.
writeup: The video from Chase AI covers the release of two language models, Claude Fable and Mythos 5, and walks through the performance metrics reported at launch. It focuses on the announcement itself and the benchmarked capabilities cited for each model. The takeaway is a summary of where these models land on the reported benchmarks, presented for an audience tracking new model releases.
